patthana8.2:1.1.pli: Nasahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā— vicikicchāsahagataṁ uddhaccasahagataṁ mohaṁ paṭicca cittasamuṭṭhānaṁ rūpaṁ, ekaṁ mahābhūtaṁ paṭicca tayo mahābhūtā …pe… dve mahābhūte paṭicca dve mahābhūtā, mahābhūte paṭicca cittasamuṭṭhānaṁ rūpaṁ kaṭattārūpaṁ upādārūpaṁ. Nasahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā— vicikicchāsahagataṁ uddhaccasahagataṁ mohaṁ paṭicca sampayuttakā khandhā; paṭisandhikkhaṇe vatthuṁ paṭicca sahetukā khandhā. Nasahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasahetuko ca naahetuko ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana8.2:2.1.pli: Naahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana8.2:3.1.pli: Nasahetukañca naahetukañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nasahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nasahetukañca naahetukañca dhammaṁ paṭicca naahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nasahetukañca naahetukañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nasahetuko ca naahetuko ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana8.2:4.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe cha, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… avigate nava.

patthana8.2:6.1.pli: Nasahetuko dhammo nasahetukassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo. Nasahetuko dhammo naahetukassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo. Nasahetuko dhammo nasahetukassa ca naahetukassa ca dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo.

patthana8.2:7.1.pli: Naahetuko dhammo naahetukassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo … tīṇi.

patthana8.2:8.1.pli: Nasahetuko dhammo nasahetukassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana8.2:9.1.pli: Hetuyā cha, ārammaṇe nava, adhipatiyā cattāri, anantare nava …pe… sahajāte nava, aññamaññe cha, nissaye upanissaye nava, purejāte pacchājāte tīṇi, āsevane nava, kamme …pe… jhāne cattāri, magge tīṇi, sampayutte cha, vippayutte pañca …pe… avigate nava.

patthana8.20:2.1.pli: Nanosaññojanaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nanosaññojano dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nanosaññojanaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nosaññojano dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nanosaññojanaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nosaññojano ca nanosaññojano ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana8.20:3.1.pli: Nosaññojanañca nanosaññojanañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nosaññojano dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nosaññojanañca nanosaññojanañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nanosaññojano dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nosaññojanañca nanosaññojanañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nosaññojano ca nanosaññojano ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana8.20:4.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe nava …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate nava. (Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana8.22:4.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe cha …pe… adhipatiyā pañca …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate nava. (Sabbattha vitthāro.)

Parāmāsavippayuttaṁ naparāmaṭṭhaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca parāmāsavippayutto naparāmaṭṭho ca parāmāsavippayutto naaparāmaṭṭho ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana8.33:11.1.pli: Parāmāsavippayuttaṁ naaparāmaṭṭhaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca parāmāsavippayutto naaparāmaṭṭho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana8.33:12.1.pli: Parāmāsavippayuttaṁ naparāmaṭṭhañca parāmāsavippayuttaṁ naaparāmaṭṭhañca dhammaṁ paṭicca parāmāsavippayutto naaparāmaṭṭho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana8.33:13.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe…. Avigate pañca.

patthana8.34:1.1.pli: Nasārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nasārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naanārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nasārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasārammaṇo ca naanārammaṇo ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana8.34:2.1.pli: Naanārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naanārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naanārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naanārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasārammaṇo ca naanārammaṇo ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana8.34:3.1.pli: Nasārammaṇañca naanārammaṇañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nasārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nasārammaṇañca naanārammaṇañca dhammaṁ paṭicca naanārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nasārammaṇañca naanārammaṇañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nasārammaṇo ca naanārammaṇo ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana8.34:4.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe tīṇi, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… aññamaññe cha …pe… purejāte āsevane ekaṁ …pe… avigate nava. (Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana8.35:1.1.pli: Nacittaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nacitto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nacittaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nanocitto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nacittaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nacitto ca nanocitto ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana8.35:2.1.pli: Nanocittaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nacitto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana8.35:3.1.pli: Nacittañca nanocittañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nacitto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana8.36:1.1.pli: Nacetasikaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nacetasiko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nacetasikaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naacetasiko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nacetasikaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nacetasiko ca naacetasiko ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana8.36:2.1.pli: Naacetasikaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naacetasiko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naacetasikaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nacetasiko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naacetasikaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nacetasiko ca naacetasiko ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana8.36:3.1.pli: Nacetasikañca naacetasikañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nacetasiko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nacetasikañca naacetasikañca dhammaṁ paṭicca naacetasiko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nacetasikañca naacetasikañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nacetasiko ca naacetasiko ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana8.36:4.1.pli: Hetuyā nava …pe… purejāte āsevane pañca …pe… avigate nava. (Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana8.37:1.1.pli: Nacittasampayuttaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nacittasampayutto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā—cittaṁ paṭicca cittasamuṭṭhānaṁ rūpaṁ. Nacittasampayuttaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nacittavippayutto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā—cittaṁ paṭicca cittasampayuttakā khandhā.

patthana8.37:2.1.pli: (Paccanīyadukamattāni na vattabbaṁ dhammaṁ pūretuṁ nava nava pañhāni karotu.)

patthana8.37:3.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe tīṇi, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… aññamaññe cha …pe… purejāte āsevane ekaṁ …pe… avigate nava.

patthana8.38:1.1.pli: Nacittasaṁsaṭṭhaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nacittasaṁsaṭṭho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana8.39:1.1.pli: Nacittasamuṭṭhānaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nacittasamuṭṭhāno dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana8.39:2.1.pli: Hetuyā nava …pe… adhipatiyā pañca …pe… purejāte āsevane pañca …pe… avigate nava.

patthana8.4:1.1.pli: Nahetuñceva naahetukañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ceva naahetuko ca dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nahetuñceva naahetukañca dhammaṁ paṭicca naahetuko ceva na nahetu ca dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nahetuñceva naahetukañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ceva naahetuko ca naahetuko ceva na nahetu ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana8.4:2.1.pli: Naahetukañceva na nahetuñca dhammaṁ paṭicca naahetuko ceva na nahetu ca dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naahetukañceva na nahetuñca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ceva naahetuko ca dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naahetukañceva na nahetuñca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ceva naahetuko ca naahetuko ceva na nahetu ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana8.4:3.1.pli: Nahetuñceva naahetukañca naahetukañceva na nahetuñca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ceva naahetuko ca dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana8.4:4.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe nava …pe… avigate nava.

patthana8.40:1.1.pli: Nacittasahabhuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nacittasahabhū dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana8.40:2.1.pli: Hetuyā nava …pe… purejāte āsevane pañca …pe… avigate nava.

patthana8.41:1.1.pli: Nacittānuparivattiṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nacittānuparivatti dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana8.42:1.1.pli: Nacittasaṁsaṭṭhasamuṭṭhānaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nacittasaṁsaṭṭhasamuṭṭhāno dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana8.43:1.1.pli: Nacittasaṁsaṭṭhasamuṭṭhānasahabhuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nacittasaṁsaṭṭhasamuṭṭhānasahabhū dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana8.44:1.1.pli: Nacittasaṁsaṭṭhasamuṭṭhānānuparivattiṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nacittasaṁsaṭṭhasamuṭṭhānānuparivatti dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā …. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana8.44:2.1.pli: Hetuyā nava …pe… purejāte āsevane pañca …pe… avigate nava. (Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana8.45:1.1.pli: Naajjhattikaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naajjhattiko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana8.45:2.1.pli: Nabāhiraṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nabāhiro dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā— paṭisandhikkhaṇe cittaṁ paṭicca ajjhattikaṁ kaṭattārūpaṁ. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana8.45:3.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe pañca …pe… avigate nava. (Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana8.46:1.1.pli: Naupādā dhammaṁ paṭicca naupādā dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naupādā dhammaṁ paṭicca nanoupādā dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naupādā dhammaṁ paṭicca naupādā ca nanoupādā ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana8.46:2.1.pli: Nanoupādā dhammaṁ paṭicca naupādā dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana8.46:3.1.pli: Naupādā ca nanoupādā ca dhammaṁ paṭicca naupādā dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana8.46:4.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe tīṇi …pe… purejāte āsevane ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana8.47:1.1.pli: Naupādinnaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naupādinno dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana8.47:2.1.pli: Naanupādinnaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naanupādinno dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naanupādinnaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naupādinno dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naanupādinnaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naupādinno ca naanupādinno ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana8.47:3.1.pli: Naupādinnañca naanupādinnañca dhammaṁ paṭicca naupādinno dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana8.47:4.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve, adhipatiyā ekaṁ …pe… āsevane ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca. (Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana8.48:1.1.pli: Naupādānaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naupādāno dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana8.48:2.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate nava.

patthana8.49:1.1.pli: Nokilesaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nokileso dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nokilesaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nanokileso dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nokilesaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nokileso ca nanokileso ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana8.49:2.1.pli: Nanokilesaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nanokileso dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana8.49:3.1.pli: Nokilesañca nanokilesañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nokileso dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana8.49:4.1.pli: Hetuyā nava …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate nava. (Sabbattha nava.)

patthana8.5:1.1.pli: Nahetuñceva nahetuvippayuttañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ceva nahetuvippayutto ca dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nahetuñceva nahetuvippayuttañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetuvippayutto ceva na nahetu ca dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nahetuñceva nahetuvippayuttañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ceva nahetuvippayutto ca nahetuvippayutto ceva na nahetu ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana8.5:2.1.pli: Nahetuvippayuttañceva na nahetuñca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetuvippayutto ceva na nahetu ca dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nahetuvippayuttañceva na nahetuñca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ceva nahetuvippayutto ca dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nahetuvippayuttañceva na nahetuñca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ceva nahetuvippayutto ca nahetuvippayutto ceva na nahetu ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana8.5:3.1.pli: Nahetuñceva nahetuvippayuttañca nahetuvippayuttañceva na nahetuñca dhammaṁ paṭicca nahetu ceva nahetuvippayutto ca dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana8.50:1.1.pli: Nasaṅkilesikaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasaṅkilesiko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nasaṅkilesikaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naasaṅkilesiko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nasaṅkilesikaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasaṅkilesiko ca naasaṅkilesiko ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana8.50:2.1.pli: Naasaṅkilesikaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naasaṅkilesiko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana8.50:3.1.pli: Nasaṅkilesikañca naasaṅkilesikañca dhammaṁ paṭicca naasaṅkilesiko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana8.50:4.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe… avigate pañca. (Sabbattha vitthāro.)

patthana8.51:1.1.pli: Nasaṅkiliṭṭhaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasaṅkiliṭṭho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.

patthana8.51:2.1.pli: Naasaṅkiliṭṭhaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca naasaṅkiliṭṭho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naasaṅkiliṭṭhaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasaṅkiliṭṭho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naasaṅkiliṭṭhaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nasaṅkiliṭṭho ca naasaṅkiliṭṭho ca dhammā uppajjanti hetupaccayā.

patthana8.51:3.1.pli: Nasaṅkiliṭṭhañca naasaṅkiliṭṭhañca dhammaṁ paṭicca nasaṅkiliṭṭho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā.  (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana8.51:4.1.pli: Hetuyā pañca, ārammaṇe dve …pe… vipāke ekaṁ …pe… avigate pañca. (Sabbattha vitthāro.)
